/usr/bin/c++   -Wall  -Wextra  -Wshadow  -Wfloat-equal  -Wold-style-cast  -Werror  -pedantic  -pedantic-errors  -Wshorten-64-to-32  -fstrict-aliasing  -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-deprecated  -Wstrict-aliasing  -Wthread-safety -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/benchmark_min_time_flag_time_test.dir/benchmark_min_time_flag_time_test.cc.o -o benchmark_min_time_flag_time_test  ../src/libbenchmark.a
